history.content:
<thought>
I can see the goal G in the row above and to my left. The cell directly in front of me is a floor '.', so I can move forward to get closer while avoiding the lava 'L' to my right/front-right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal G on the right side of my current position, but the cell directly in front of me is unknown (not shown) and there is lava to the right. To avoid stepping into lava, I should first turn to get a safe alignment toward the goal rather than moving forward immediately.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal (G) just left of my current position, with lava (L) directly below it. The cell in front of me is a floor (.) and moving forward should bring me closer to the goal without stepping into lava. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
